formatted_display: English: Saturday, 11 April 2026 | Nepali: Saturday, 28 Chaitra 2082
quote: The law of harvest is to reap more than you sow. Sow an act, and you reap a habit. Sow a habit and you reap a character. Sow a character and you reap a destiny.
formatted_quote: "The law of harvest is to reap more than you sow. Sow an act, and you reap a habit. Sow a habit and you reap a character. Sow a character and you reap a destiny." - James Allen
